name: Restorna Platform
description: Multi-tenant restaurant-OS SaaS control plane — Go microservices, cloud-agnostic. Each service is a 12-factor container that binds $PORT.

APP_ENV.description: Runtime environment (dev|staging|production). dev enables the dev OTP code.

DATABASE_URL.description: Postgres DSN shared by the control-plane services (or per-service if split).

NATS_URL.description: NATS (JetStream) URL for the event bus, e.g. nats://nats:4222.

JWT_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Ed25519 public key (base64 std) — shared verify key for every service's auth interceptor.

JWT_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Ed25519 private key (base64 std) — ONLY the identity service needs this to sign tokens.

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT.description: Optional OTLP collector endpoint for traces.
